Slaughterhouse 9.title: Slaughterhouse 9
Slaughterhouse 9.description: Slaughterhouse 9 is a survival horror RPGMaker horror game developed by TeamAfterMath Games, a studio consisting of a friend of mine, the main director and artist. And myself, the lead programmer.
Slaughterhouse 9.efforts: I have contributed to the project by programming custom RPGMaker MV plugins to create custom battle logic and creates a system out of existing plugins with different uses.

Cafe Game.title: Cuppa of Conspiracy
Cafe Game.description: Cuppa of Conspiracy is a turn-based dungeon crawler crime thriller made in RPGMaker MZ. It is my solo project I work on in my free time. It is a heavily modified version of RPGMaker MZ with custom JavaScript plugins.
Cafe Game.efforts: I have written myself to change the fundamental functionality of the engine with an entirely different battle system and all new mechanics.

Gremlin Party 64.title: Gremlin Party 64
Gremlin Party 64.description: Gremlin Party 64 is a platform fighter currently in-development, inspired by Super Smash Bros. 64 with a grungy early 2000's style.
Gremlin Party 64.efforts: My involvement in this project is small but I am currently overseeing the development of two playable fighters which are characters that I have own and have created. I have designed the movesets and are responsible for feedback on artistic direction for translating the character designs to fit in the game.
